title: tppr Paper Metadata
description: Minimal paper metadata for listing, searching, and previews.

author_id.description: User ID of the paper creator.

year.description: The year this paper is from (e.g. 2024).

source.description: Origin of the paper: official HSC, school trial, internal assessment, practice, or custom.

school.description: School name, relevant for trial/internal papers (e.g. 'James Ruse').

course_level.description: Course level tier, applicable to Mathematics and English.

topics.description: Aggregate topic tags across all questions.

visibility.description: Whether this paper is visible in the public question pool.

question_count.description: Number of questions in the paper.

total_marks.description: Sum of marks across all questions.
